findings.title: AWS S3 public access block not fully enabled
findings.description: S3 public access block settings are missing or not all set to true, leaving the bucket exposed to public access controls.

iac_evidence.expected_vs_actual: All required public-access-block attributes must be True; failing: block_public_acls=False, ignore_public_acls=False

iac_details.expected_value: All required public-access-block attributes must be True
iac_details.remediation_hint: Enable all four public-access-block attributes (block_public_acls, block_public_policy, ignore_public_acls, restrict_public_buckets).

findings.title: AWS S3 bucket missing server-side encryption
findings.description: S3 server-side encryption configuration is missing or does not specify an allowed sse_algorithm literal.

iac_evidence.expected_vs_actual: Expected encryption configuration; observed missing/unreadable encryption block.

iac_details.observed_value: No server_side_encryption_configuration block (or no sse_algorithm literal).
iac_details.remediation_hint: Add server_side_encryption_configuration with a rule that sets apply_server_side_encryption_by_default.sse_algorithm to AES256 or aws:kms.
